name: Brighthouse Financial, Inc.
business: Brighthouse Financial, Inc. is one of the largest providers of annuity and life insurance products in the U.S. It delivers products through multiple independent distribution channels and marketing arrangements with a diverse network of distribution partners. The company primarily transacts business through its insurance subsidiaries.

exposures.sentence: We are one of the largest providers of annuity and life insurance products in the U.S. with over 2.0 million annuity contracts and insurance policies in force at December 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Closing of the Merger with Aquarian Parent
catalysts.sentence: The Merger is expected to close in 2026.
